signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability defend against rip pass rush moves as if they had an additional resistance point
Passers with this ability can make all hot route and blocking adjustments twice as fast (excluding audibles).
Locker room pep talks go a long way. Players with this ability can easily enter the Zone in the 2nd half.
Passers with this ability improve the catching prowess of all tight ends who are open on pass plays.
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability start every new blocking encounter with built-in resistance
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability will dominantly win run blocks when they correctly use the Guess Play adjustment to predict a run. Incorrect guesses will result in a loss.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Momentum Shift players demoralize their opponents. When they enter the zone, all on field opponents are knocked out of the zone or lose any progress towards entering the zone.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
